doc.projectIntro: This quote covers a dedicated 100Mbps failover internet link supplied via Openserve for GSR Law, provided as a monthly service on a 12-month contract term. There is no installation charge. All prices exclude VAT (15%).

items.detail: Dedicated failover internet connectivity, 100Mbps · monthly rental · 12-month term

doc.summaryNote: No installation charge. Monthly rental is billed in advance for the duration of the 12-month contract term.
terms: This quote is valid for 14 days from the date of issue.
All prices exclude VAT at 15% unless otherwise stated.
This service is provided on a 12-month contract term.
The monthly rental is billed in advance and recurs monthly for the duration of the contract term.
Service provisioning is subject to Openserve line feasibility at the site.
There is no installation charge for this service.
